name: Black-Eyed Peas with Ham
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 cups Fresh black-eyed peas or Frozen, thawed
3 cups Chicken stock or low-salt canned broth
2 tbsp Balsamic vinegar or Red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to a boil in a heavy large saucepan.
2. Reduce heat and simmer until peas are tender, stirring occasionally, about 45 minutes.
3. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
